name: compile_brief
description: Assess issue workability and compile gathered context into an enriched brief for the implementation agent

already_resolved.description: True if the problem described in the issue no longer exists (verified against current repo state). If true, the issue should be closed, not implemented.

resolution_comment.description: When already_resolved is true, explain what evidence shows the problem is fixed (e.g. which files now exist, which config is correct)

workable.description: Whether the issue can be implemented by an automated agent. Ignored if already_resolved is true.

confidence.description: Confidence that the agent can successfully implement this issue

cross_repo_action.description: Routing action when cross_repo_dependency is the blocker. 'transfer' moves the issue to the target repo when all work belongs there. 'create_blocker' creates a blocking issue in the target repo when the current repo's fix depends on another repo first. 'none' falls through to needs-triage.

target_repo.description: Full owner/name of the target repo (e.g. 'nsalab-tmn/some-repo'). Required when cross_repo_action is 'transfer' or 'create_blocker'.

blocker_title.description: Title for the blocking issue to create in the target repo. Used when cross_repo_action is 'create_blocker'.

blocker_body.description: Self-contained body for the blocking issue. Must include: what to fix, why, acceptance criteria, and key files. The reader will not have access to the original issue. Used when cross_repo_action is 'create_blocker'.

objective.description: What the issue asks for, distilled to 1-2 sentences

repo_context.description: What this repo does, relevant architecture, in 2-3 sentences

key_files.description: File paths the agent should read or modify

conventions.description: Relevant conventions distilled from all loaded docs that the agent must follow

gotchas.description: Pitfalls to avoid, from conventions and recent PR patterns

branch_name.description: Branch name following convention: fix/N-slug or feature/N-slug
